description: Storyteller is a self-hosted platform for ebook reading and library management. It supports multiple ebook formats including EPUB, PDF, and MOBI. Features include a modern web-based reader, library organization, metadata management, and multi-user support. Built with Django and includes optional Readium reader integration for enhanced reading experience.
author: BigBearCommunity

tips.before_install: Generate a secure secret key using: openssl rand -base64 32

title: Storyteller
